business.name: Cooper & Co Plumbing & Heating
business.tagline: Keeping Leeds Homes Warm Year Round

contact.address: Unit 40 B2 Springfield Commercial Centre, Bagley Lane, Pudsey, Farsley, Leeds LS28 5LY

sample_reviews.author: James Thornton
sample_reviews.text: Brilliant service from start to finish. Cooper & Co had my boiler replaced quickly and at a fair price. Very professional and tidy workers.

sample_reviews.author: Sarah Mitchell
sample_reviews.text: Called them out when our heating packed in during winter. They were there within a couple of hours and had us back up and running the same day. Highly recommend.

sample_reviews.author: David Kaur
sample_reviews.text: Very knowledgeable team. Serviced our boiler and spotted a fault we didn't know about. Sorted it out there and then. Good value for money in the Leeds area.

brand.usp: Cooper & Co Plumbing & Heating delivers reliable, expert central heating solutions across Leeds and surrounding areas, with a commitment to transparent pricing and same-day emergency response.
brand.hero_headline: Expert Heating Solutions for Leeds Homes
brand.about_paragraph: We're Cooper & Co Plumbing & Heating, based right here in Pudsey, Leeds, and we've been keeping local homes warm and safe for years. From boiler installations and annual servicing to emergency callouts, our Gas Safe registered engineers bring honest advice and quality workmanship every time. We're proud to serve families and businesses across Leeds, Bradford, and the surrounding areas with care and reliability.
